action.reasoning: Observation: Best remains 0.6537 bal_acc (iter24 RN50 cRT: Focal(g=2)/sqrt-s1-60ep+mix/cut-rand-p0.5+RandAug+AdamW5e-4-cos, CE/count-s2-40ep+SGD0.05-nest+head-reinit/freeze after best-s1, post-tau=1.7 grid val=0.644). Latest (iter28) only hit val=0.575/tau-val=0.617 & test=0.6259; stdout shows no stage2 lift. Analysis: Current (truncated/incomplete) train.py misses key cRT elements (head reinit after s1 best, proper named_param freeze of backbone only, count-based balanced sampler in s2, full per-epoch val+periodic loss logging, offset steps, Cosine per stage, label_smoothing in s2 CE). Model/predict stable (CIFAR-stem RN50, weights_only=False, batched norm+logit-adj+best_tau+counts in ckpt). Decision: Fully overwrite train.py with clean complete code replicating exact successful iter24 config (+minor stable improvements: label_smoothing=0.1 in s2, explicit reinit/freeze/opt/sampler/scheduler/best-save-across-stages+tau-grid-0-3-step-0.05, seeds, mix/cut rand-50% in s1, full metrics.jsonl per-20step-loss+per-epoch-val-with-stage). Run python train.py then submit_eval on best.pt (expected >=0.65, ~6min fits 1h/2 iters left, follows >20ep rule).
